qry:select.name: QRY_RECIBOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_tot_liq_per FROM LIQ19_EJECUCIONES AS E , LIQ99_LIQUIDACION AS L , LIQ99_RECIBOS AS R , LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER AS T , LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ AS PL JOIN E.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER L.oi_liquidacion_ddo , L.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER R.oi_liquidacion_ddo , R.oi_tot_liq_per INNER T.oi_tot_liq_per , E.oi_liquidacion INNER PL.oi_liquidacion WHERE L.c_estado = \'F\' AND E.oi_liquidacion = {#FILTRO:DATOS/@oi_liquidacionFIL} AND PL.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#SOURCE:@value%}) ')ROWS/ROW
